meta.label: Animations
meta.note: An animation is a (dict, anim) pair: REQUEST_ANIM_DICT(dict) then TASK_PLAY_ANIM(dict, anim). index.json = the CURATED set with friendly names + categories (browse via by-category/). The FULL list lives in dictionaries.json (names + counts) and all.json (every dictionary + animations). No images, no hash.
